nonBlockingIssues.description: CLI remote send/read paths (src/cli.ts) still call RelayClient.send/read directly rather than sendEncrypted/readDecrypted, so encrypted transport is opt-in via explicit method calls rather than the default CLI remote flow. This is expected to be addressed in later milestones when CLI E2EE UX is fully wired.

appliedUpdates.description: Added dist/ rebuild caveat to .factory/library/environment.md — workers must run `npm run build` after TS source changes before full test suite, as some tests execute from dist/.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen mors-global-worker skill: require workers to either (a) include interactiveChecks evidence in handoff verification for user-facing changes, or (b) explicitly document a 'not applicable' rationale when the feature is internal-only. Workers marking followedProcedure=true without either should be flagged. Consider adding a handoff schema check or skill-step reminder.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: 4 of 5 fix feature reviews flagged the same pattern: handoffs marked followedProcedure=true with command-only verification and no interactiveChecks block or not-applicable rationale, despite skill step 8 requiring manual checks for user-facing surfaces. Features: global-async-fix-dedupe-context-compatibility, global-async-fix-relay-client-durability-and-cli-wiring, global-async-fix-cli-relayclient-command-wiring, global-async-fix-e2ee-transport-integration, global-async-fix-revocation-enforced-key-exchange.
